## Change

Describe the problem and the implemented behavior.

## Business Impact

Explain which data product, control or user workflow changes.

## Verification

- [ ] Python tests and Ruff
- [ ] Rust tests/contracts when applicable
- [ ] dbt build/tests when applicable
- [ ] Streaming replay when applicable
- [ ] Dashboard smoke/visual review when applicable
- [ ] Documentation and evidence updated

## Scope

- [ ] Integrated functionality and blueprint-only functionality remain clearly labelled
- [ ] No credentials, generated datasets or sensitive information were added
